---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Who hits it and when?

## Proposed direction

What you'd like Quorum to do.

## Scope / non-goals

Anything explicitly out of scope, or claims that should stay gated until a
verifier proves them (see `docs/requirements.md` claim policy).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches, tools, or workarounds you evaluated.
